title: Protons Create Additions
description: Expanding the create mod and minecraft!
body:
Proton's Additions

Proton's Create Additions is a simple mod that is currently under development.
It adds multiple new blocks and items. Some of them are listed below:

 

Item Collector:

The item collector is a new create block that collects nearby items. It works by powering the block with a rotational power source beneath it. The item collector requires a specific speed to activate and run at.

There is more documentation on it in game using Create's Ponder feature. The item collector can now work on moving contraptions as long as there is shared storage via chests and barrels on the contraption. If you notice the item collector going invisible when mounting on a contraption, it is just a visual bug that I am still resolving but the main functionality will still work.

 

Dripstone Launcher:

The dripstone launcher is a particular create block that is able to spawn a pointed dripstone projectile that deals damage. The damage dealt corresponds to the rotation speed provided. A Redstone signal must be provided in order to fire the launcher. You can restock the launcher using mechanical arms / a deployer.

 

Tungsten Hammer

Made of tungsten this hammer is potent, dealing 10 hit points per hit. But that isn't its only functionality, Deploy the hammer by right clicking on the ground and it will spin around you and knockback any mob that gets too close! But be careful as other players and projectiles can cause the hammer to return to your inventory!

 

Tranquilizer Dart and blowgun

The blowgun can be used to fire darts, currently it can only fire tranquilizer darts. These darts will cause temporary brain death for mobs by disabling their AIs, goal selectors and target selectors. Though do be warned this is only temporary and you have to hurry before they regain their consciousness! 

 

Tungsten ingot, nugget, sheet, rod

Used to craft darts, hammers, weapons and tungsten based blocks!

 

Tungsten blocks

Currently contains tungsten casing and block.

 

Re-added removed create items

Re-added removed create items and gave them new purpose!

 

This mod requires the following mods: Create, Flywheel and Geckolib

 

Planned stuff in the future:


- Copper Turret
(Inspired by create big cannons, This one is fully automatic and will aim and shoot at enemies automatically!)

 


- Radiant Railgun

 


- Tungsten Armor
